goal: Create the next realistic structured-family architecture and implement the safest subset possible.
whatWasImplemented: Added a read-only structured-family model for preserved raw structured records.
Added disabled editor scaffold fields for hl.bind and other structured families.
Added a structured family review workflow for hl.bind candidates that keeps repeated entries read-only.
The review workflow exposes invalid input reasons, raw line preservation requirements, and comments/order preservation requirements.
Added structured edit candidate validation that blocks invalid family prefixes and multiline input.
Added fixture parser/model tests for key binding entries.
Kept active safe-batch structured-family copy blocked.
Identified read-only parser/display work as the safest next subset.
Added lossless render proof for read-only hl.bind entries by preserving raw structured lines when no edit occurs.
Added safe-env-only hl.bind exact-line edit proof for temp fixture files.
The safe-env edit proof verifies stale-line blocking, invalid-input blocking, comment/order preservation, reread parse verification, and real-path refusal.
Production structured writes remain disabled despite fixture proof.
No additional production-safe structured write step was available this sprint without an approved structured write gate beyond the existing hl.bind fixture proof.
This sprint rechecked structured writes and found no safe production step beyond existing hl.bind fixture proof without structured approval and safe-batch integration.
Controlled live-test guard records reversible structured-write prerequisites; production structured writes remain disabled.
whatWasNotImplemented: No monitor, bind, window rule, workspace rule, device, gesture, permission, animation, or curve writer was enabled.
No real structured config mutation was attempted.

safetyBoundaries.firstSafeEnvWriteCandidate: hl.bind single-line replacement after lossless render proof

blockers: Structured production writes need an approved safe-batch integration gate after lossless parse/edit/render proof.
Each structured family still needs family-specific preservation tests for comments, ordering, repeated records, and invalid input rejection.
Only hl.bind has the new lossless safe-env exact-line edit proof; other structured families remain read-only scaffolds.
nextRecommendedWork: Wire source/include selected-target dry-run preview into the disabled detail UI and add a temp-fixture guarded live-test executor for non-real config paths.
